data_sources.live_calibration_usage: Applied only to future matches in live_predictions; evaluation uses uncalibrated base
data_sources.notes: All evaluation rolling/cumulative avoid future leakage by construction (sorted historical matches).

miss_analysis.common_failure_patterns: Dominant failure: heavy 1-1 top predictions missing high variance actual scores (especially 5+ goal matches). 1X2 roughly random (~47%). Volume underestimation consistent. Aggregate outcome slightly better than exact but still poor.

calibration_analysis.justified_by_evidence: Yes, directionally but conservative given persistent gap and 8 high-scoring (5+) misses.

current.rationale: Current smoothed factor from rolling window of 15 matches. Actual gap persistent (~+0.39 goals). Raw ratio 1.148.
current.expected_effect_on_scoreline: Slight increase in higher goal totals and 2-1/1-2/2-2 etc over pure 1-1.
current.expected_effect_on_1-1_concentration: Modest reduction in future 1-1 top predictions.
current.risk: Small sample (36 total); risk of over-correcting if high scores were anomalies.

moderate.rationale: Add a small boost to address persistent volume gap while respecting small sample and half-smoothing precedent.
moderate.expected_effect_on_scoreline: Noticeable shift away from low scoring predictions for future matches.
moderate.expected_effect_on_1-1_concentration: Should lower 1-1 dominance by 10-15 percentage points in expectation.
moderate.risk: May increase overestimation on low-scoring games.

aggressive.rationale: Closer to observed raw ratio 1.148 and window ratio 1.138. High-scoring games (8 matches with 5+ goals) are frequent.
aggressive.expected_effect_on_scoreline: Larger shift; more 2+ goal scorelines predicted.
aggressive.risk: High risk of chasing noise in small sample of 36 matches; 1X2 accuracy could degrade if variance increases.

recommendation.recommended_factor_policy: Apply moderate uplift (+0.03 to +0.05 on top of current smoothed) only for live future predictions; re-evaluate after 8-10 more matches. Keep separate from backtest.
reasoning: Persistent positive goal gap across 36 matches (+0.39 avg).
8 matches with 5+ goals missed top5 or heavily underestimated (6 matches had exactly 4 goals).
Extreme 1-1 concentration (94% of top predictions) indicates under-dispersion in baseline.
Current factor 1.056 is conservative smoothing; raw data supports ~1.14.
1X2 accuracy is ~47% (barely above random for 3-way) so volume fix is higher priority than outcome calibration.
Sample size 36 is modest but gap direction is consistent across rolling.
risks: Small sample: 36 evaluated; high scores may be early-tournament anomaly.
Over-inflation may hurt accuracy on genuinely low-scoring matches.
Do not retro-apply to backtest reports.
what_to_monitor_next: Next 4-6 matches actual vs predicted totals.
Change in top-1 1-1 % in new live predictions.
Whether 1X2 accuracy improves or degrades with higher variance predictions.
If new high-scoring games continue at same rate.

warnings: Model shows systematic underestimation of goal volume.
Very high 1-1 concentration indicates conservative Poisson + Dixon-Coles baseline.
Audit generated from backtest base predictions; live predictions have applied calibration already.
